recommendations.title: The Adventures of Priscilla, Queen of the Desert
recommendations.overview: Two drag performers and a transgender woman travel across the desert to perform their unique style of cabaret.

recommendations.title: A Few Best Men
recommendations.overview: A groom and his three best men travel to the Australian outback for a wedding.

recommendations.title: Eye of the Beholder
recommendations.overview: A reclusive surveillance expert is hired to spy on a mysterious blackmailer, who just may be a serial killer.

recommendations.title: The Time Machine
recommendations.genres: Thriller, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction, Romance
recommendations.overview: A Victorian Englishman travels to the far future and finds that humanity has divided into two hostile species.

recommendations.title: Guess Who
recommendations.overview: When a young African-American woman brings her fiancé home to meet her parents, she's neglected to mention one tiny detail – he's white.

recommendations.title: The Holiday
recommendations.overview: Two women, one American and one British, swap homes at Christmastime following bad breakups. Each woman finds romance with a local man but realizes that the imminent return home may end the relationship.

recommendations.title: Anora
recommendations.overview: A young sex worker from Brooklyn gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and impulsively marries the son of an oligarch. Once the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened as his parents set out to get the marriage annulled.

recommendations.title: You've Got This
recommendations.overview: An ad creative and a successful exec have a great marriage — until he wants to be a dad just as her star is rising. Then he brings someone new home.

recommendations.title: We Made a Beautiful Bouquet
recommendations.overview: Two people meet each other after missing the last train home, leading to a beautiful relationship over five years.

recommendations.title: Monte Carlo
recommendations.overview: Three young women vacationing in Paris find themselves whisked away to Monte Carlo after one of the girls is mistaken for a British heiress.
